overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through Night City's downtown district during dusk. The scene features futuristic neon-lit architecture, elevated highways, and moderate traffic as the player navigates through intersections and uphill streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway corridor with industrial warehouses

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the multi-lane street beneath elevated highway ramps

entered.detail: curved elevated highway structure with green lighting running overhead
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated '02' signage near the top
large industrial structure with metal scaffolding and corrugated panels
large illuminated advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives straight along a multi-lane road beneath elevated highway ramps. An industrial building with metal scaffolding dominates the right side, while a distant skyscraper with '02' signage looms ahead. The street is relatively empty with sparse traffic.

events.description: approaching red traffic light, vehicles ahead begin slowing down
vehicle begins turning right at the Ventura intersection

agents.ego_description: slowing down for red light and preparing to turn right at the intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan ahead slowing down for the red traffic light

entered.detail: red illuminated street sign reading 'Ventura' suspended over the intersection
zebra crossing markings on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a major intersection marked by a red 'Ventura' street sign. Traffic slows for a red light as the camera vehicle prepares to turn right. The industrial building recedes to the mid-ground as the intersection opens up.

events.description: completes right turn and enters the intersection proper
vehicle initiates left turn onto upward sloping street

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection, turning right then left around the block

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing on the street corner near a building entrance

entered.detail: large blue and red sign reading 'CIRRUS' on building facade
corner building with large digital displays and yellow trim
massive screen displaying advertisements with a man's face

segments.scene_description: After turning right, the vehicle moves through a commercial intersection featuring the Cirrus Mall and large digital billboards. Two pedestrians stand on the corner as the vehicle prepares to turn left onto a different street.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill commercial street with large billboards

events.description: enters uphill street with different architectural character

agents.ego_description: driving uphill past large commercial billboards and brick buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street ahead on the uphill slope

entered.detail: large red illuminated billboard displaying 'CONBATCAB' and '35% OFF' messaging
road sloping upward with yellow grid markings at the intersection base
metal overhead walkway connecting buildings above the street
older brick-style buildings with multiple stories and fire escapes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns left onto an uphill street dominated by a massive red CONBATCAB billboard. The architecture shifts to older brick commercial buildings with fire escapes. A pedestrian crosses ahead on the sloping road as the vehicle continues upward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic urban district that transforms from a stark industrial corridor into a dense commercial hillside. It begins moving straight along a multi-lane road beneath elevated highway ramps, passing a metal scaffolding structure while a distant skyscraper with 02 signage looms ahead. As the vehicle approaches a major intersection marked by a red Ventura sign, the industrial surroundings recede to make way for a wide crossing where the car slows for a red light. The scene then opens into a vibrant commercial hub featuring the Cirrus Mall and large digital billboards before the vehicle turns left onto a sloping street. Finally, the architecture shifts to older brick buildings with fire escapes as the camera climbs uphill beneath a massive red CONBATCAB billboard.
